---
name: Medical Review Required
about: Request Medical Advisor review for health-facing behavior or language
labels: needs-medical-review
---

## What changed
Describe the content, feature, or model behavior requiring review.

## Why medical review is required
- [ ] New health-facing copy
- [ ] Updated disclaimer language
- [ ] AI response/prompt behavior changed
- [ ] New symptom interpretation flow
- [ ] New escalation logic
- [ ] Other medical safety concern

## Relevant artifacts
List file paths and snippets to review.

## Safety checklist
- [ ] No diagnostic claims
- [ ] No medication/treatment advice
- [ ] Required disclaimer included
- [ ] Escalation language included where needed

## Requested outcome
- [ ] APPROVE
- [ ] NEEDS_CHANGES
- [ ] BLOCK

Reference: docs/MEDICAL_GUIDELINES.md
